params.name: order_desc
params.description: order by desc order (default true)

params.name: created_by
params.description: filter by exact matching user creator. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'alice,bob') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!alice,!bob')

params.name: parent_job
params.description: The parent job that is at the origin and responsible for the execution of this script if any

params.name: worker
params.description: filter by worker this job ran on. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'worker-1,worker-2') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!worker-1,!worker-2')

params.name: script_path_exact
params.description: filter by exact matching script path. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'f/script1,f/script2') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!f/script1,!f/script2')

params.name: script_path_start
params.description: filter by script path prefix. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'f/folder1,f/folder2') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!f/folder1,!f/folder2')

params.name: schedule_path
params.description: mask to filter by schedule path

params.name: trigger_path
params.description: filter by trigger path. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'f/trigger1,f/trigger2') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!f/trigger1,!f/trigger2')

params.name: trigger_kind
params.description: filter by trigger kind. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'schedule,webhook') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!schedule,!webhook')

params.name: script_hash
params.description: mask to filter exact matching path

params.name: started_before
params.description: filter on started before (inclusive) timestamp

params.name: started_after
params.description: filter on started after (exclusive) timestamp

params.name: success
params.description: filter on successful jobs

params.name: scheduled_for_before_now
params.description: filter on jobs scheduled_for before now (hence waitinf for a worker)

params.name: job_kinds
params.description: filter by job kind. Supports comma-separated list of values ('preview', 'script', 'dependencies', 'flow') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!preview,!dependencies')

params.name: suspended
params.description: filter on suspended jobs

params.name: running
params.description: filter on running jobs

params.name: args
params.description: filter on jobs containing those args as a json subset (@> in postgres)

params.name: result
params.description: filter on jobs containing those result as a json subset (@> in postgres)

params.name: allow_wildcards
params.description: allow wildcards (*) in the filter of label, tag, worker

params.name: tag
params.description: filter by tag/worker group. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'gpu,highmem') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!gpu,!highmem')

params.name: page
params.description: which page to return (start at 1, default 1)

params.name: per_page
params.description: number of items to return for a given page (default 30, max 100)

params.description: get jobs from all workspaces (only valid if request come from the `admins` workspace)

params.name: is_not_schedule
params.description: is not a scheduled job

info.name: Get Intervals of Job Runtime Concurrency

params.name: created_by
params.description: filter by exact matching user creator. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'alice,bob') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!alice,!bob')

params.name: label
params.description: filter by exact matching job label. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'deploy,release') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!deploy,!release')

params.name: parent_job
params.description: The parent job that is at the origin and responsible for the execution of this script if any

params.name: script_path_exact
params.description: filter by exact matching script path. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'f/script1,f/script2') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!f/script1,!f/script2')

params.name: script_path_start
params.description: filter by script path prefix. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'f/folder1,f/folder2') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!f/folder1,!f/folder2')

params.name: schedule_path
params.description: mask to filter by schedule path

params.name: script_hash
params.description: mask to filter exact matching path

params.name: started_before
params.description: filter on started before (inclusive) timestamp

params.name: started_after
params.description: filter on started after (exclusive) timestamp

params.name: running
params.description: filter on running jobs

params.name: scheduled_for_before_now
params.description: filter on jobs scheduled_for before now (hence waitinf for a worker)

params.name: completed_before
params.description: filter on started before (inclusive) timestamp

params.name: completed_after
params.description: filter on started after (exclusive) timestamp

params.name: created_before_queue
params.description: filter on jobs created before X for jobs in the queue only

params.name: created_after_queue
params.description: filter on jobs created after X for jobs in the queue only

params.name: job_kinds
params.description: filter by job kind. Supports comma-separated list of values ('preview', 'script', 'dependencies', 'flow') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!preview,!dependencies')

params.name: args
params.description: filter on jobs containing those args as a json subset (@> in postgres)

params.name: tag
params.description: filter by tag/worker group. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'gpu,highmem') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!gpu,!highmem')

params.name: result
params.description: filter on jobs containing those result as a json subset (@> in postgres)

params.name: allow_wildcards
params.description: allow wildcards (*) in the filter of label, tag, worker

params.name: page
params.description: which page to return (start at 1, default 1)

params.name: per_page
params.description: number of items to return for a given page (default 30, max 100)

params.name: trigger_kind
params.description: filter by trigger kind. Supports comma-separated list (e.g. 'schedule,webhook') and negation by prefixing all values with '!' (e.g. '!schedule,!webhook')

params.name: is_skipped
params.description: is the job skipped

params.name: is_flow_step
params.description: is the job a flow step

params.name: has_null_parent
params.description: has null parent

params.name: success
params.description: filter on successful jobs

params.name: all_workspaces
params.description: get jobs from all workspaces (only valid if request come from the `admins` workspace)

params.name: is_not_schedule
params.description: is not a scheduled job
